subtasks.description: Query AWS contract management system to retrieve contracted commit levels (RIs, Savings Plans, On-Demand commitments) by service, region, and term, joined with actual spend data to calculate variance (contracted vs actual spend), utilization %, and commitment burn rate

Reconcile contracted commitments with actual spend results to identify overcommitment (unused capacity), underutilization (spend below committed level), and optimization opportunities. Classify each commitment as 'optimized', 'overcommitted', 'underutilized', or 'at-risk'. Generate prioritized recommendations for reallocation or rightsizing

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) to join AWS contract and spend tables with multi-table aggregation by service/region and variance calculations—standard SQL but requires careful join logic and window functions for utilization rates. (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile contracted vs actual, classify posture, and recommend actions—this is a single-source reconciliation (contracted terms vs spend actuals from same data warehouse) that benefits from multi-signal comparison but does not require frontier-level inference. The query does not request policy evaluation, so no policy_action is needed; classification and recommendations are part of the cross_recon output. No external source reconciliation (e.g., vendor invoices) is required, so plan remains minimal at 2 subtasks.

output.raw_output: {"sql": "SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS contracted_commit_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage','actual','consumption','spend') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS actual_spend_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage','actual','consumption','spend') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS variance_usd, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage','actual','consumption','spend') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS utilization_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('usage','actual','consumption','spend') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN cf.event_type IN ('reservation','savings_plan','committed','commit','RI','on_demand_commitment') THEN cf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) ELSE NULL END AS burn_rate_pct, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, SUM(inf.amount_usd) AS invoiced_amount_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT inf.invoice_id) AS invoice_count, SUM(CASE WHEN inf.status = 'paid' THEN inf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS paid_invoices_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN inf.status IN ('overdue','unpaid','outstanding') THEN inf.amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS outstanding_invoices_usd FROM consumption_facts cf LEFT JOIN invoice_facts inf ON cf.license_id::TEXT = inf.contract_id::TEXT AND cf.publisher = inf.vendor_name WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%aws%' OR cf.publisher ILIKE '%amazon%' GROUP BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.
